requirements.text: The system shall display a 'Find your trip by' section on the homepage.
The system shall provide an input field labeled 'Confirmation Number' within the 'Find your trip by' section.
The system shall provide an input field labeled 'First Name' within the 'Find your trip by' section.
The system shall provide an input field labeled 'Last Name' within the 'Find your trip by' section.
The system shall allow the user to input text into the 'Confirmation Number' field.
The system shall display the entered value 'SFTBAO' in the 'Confirmation Number' field after user input.
The system shall allow the user to input text into the 'First Name' field.
The system shall display the entered value 'Joe' in the 'First Name' field after user input.
The system shall allow the user to input text into the 'Last Name' field.
The system shall display the entered value 'Lukeman' in the 'Last Name' field after user input.
The system shall display a red circular button to submit the trip search.
